example.zh: 前夫哥都能当盛阳的叔叔了。

example.en: Shi Ying hides under the stone to avoid the rain.
example.zh: 时影躲在石头下避雨。

example.en: Xiao Zhan stands up and waves to his fans.
example.zh: 肖战站起来向粉丝挥手。

example.en: Xiao Zhan smiles at us and we feel so warm.
example.zh: 肖战对我们微笑，我们倍感温暖。

example.en: Liu Zhengliang uses a stethoscope to check the patient.
example.zh: 刘铮亮用听诊器检查病人。

example.en: Xiao Zhan eats fresh vegetables every day.
example.zh: 肖战每天吃新鲜的蔬菜。

example.en: Xiao Zhan is very kind to all the people around him.
example.zh: 肖战对身边的人非常友善。

example.en: Zhu Yan visits Shi Ying on Jiuyi Mountain.
example.zh: 朱颜去九嶷山拜访时影。

example.en: Fans wait for Xiao Zhan at the airport quietly.
example.zh: 粉丝在机场安静等待肖战。

example.en: Xiao Zhan wakes up early and does exercise.
example.zh: 肖战早早醒来锻炼。

example.en: Gu Wei walks with his family in the park after work.
example.zh: 顾魏下班后和家人在公园散步。

example.en: There's Xiao Zhan's poster on my bedroom wall.
example.zh: 我卧室墙上贴着肖战的海报。

example.en: Xiao Zhan wants to bring good works to his fans.
example.zh: 肖战想要给粉丝带来好的作品。

example.en: Xiao Zhan's smile is as warm as the spring sun.
example.zh: 肖战的笑容像春日阳光一样温暖。

example.en: Sheng Yang washes the dishes for his mom after dinner.
example.zh: 盛阳晚饭后帮妈妈洗碗。

example.en: Maybe Fang watch the stars at night.
example.zh: 方也许夜晚看星星。

example.en: Xiao Zhan wears a simple watch on his wrist.
example.zh: 肖战手腕上戴一块简约的手表。

example.en: Xiao Zhan walks on the hard way of acting bravely.
example.zh: 肖战用保温杯喝水。

example.en: Shi Ying waters the flowers in her garden every day.
example.zh: 时影每天给花园里的花浇水。

example.en: This is the best way for Shi Ying to protect the world.
example.zh: 这是时影守护天下的最好方式。

example.en: We watch the new drama of Xiao Zhan together.
example.zh: 我们一起看肖战的新剧。

example.en: Xiao Zhan wears a white shirt in the interview.
example.zh: 肖战在采访中穿白色衬衫。

example.en: The weather on Jiuyi Mountain is nice today.
example.zh: 九嶷山今天的天气很好。

example.en: Xiao Zhan works hard for a whole week on filming.
example.zh: 肖战整整一周都在刻苦拍戏。

example.en: The villagers welcome Zanghai to their village.
example.zh: 村民们欢迎藏海来到村子。

example.en: Xiao Zhan is very welcome in every city he goes to.
example.zh: 肖战走到每个城市都很受欢迎。

example.en: Xiao Zhan acts well in every role he plays.
example.zh: 肖战每个角色都演得很好。

example.en: Xiao Zhan is well every day.
example.zh: 肖战每天都健健康康。

example.en: Fans want to know what Xiao Zhan likes to eat.
example.zh: 粉丝想知道肖战喜欢吃什么。

example.en: Fans ask when Xiao Zhan's new drama will air.
example.zh: 粉丝问肖战的新剧什么时候播出。

example.en: When Xiao Zhan sings, all fans listen quietly.
example.zh: 当肖战唱歌时，所有粉丝都安静聆听。

example.en: Fans wonder where Xiao Zhan will go next.
example.zh: 粉丝好奇肖战接下来要去哪里。

example.en: Fans ask which role is Xiao Zhan's favorite.
example.zh: 粉丝问肖战最喜欢哪个角色。

example.en: Which road leads to the top of Jiuyi Mountain?
example.zh: 哪一条路通向九嶷山顶？

example.en: Shi Ying's white robe flutters in the wind on the mountain.
example.zh: 时影的白长袍在山间迎风飘动。

example.en: The white of the snow makes Jiuyi Mountain pure.
example.zh: 雪的白色让九嶷山变得纯净。

example.en: Who doesn't love Xiao Zhan's sincere performances?
example.zh: 谁会不喜欢肖战真诚的表演呢？

example.en: Whose sword is this that Zanghai’s holding?
example.zh: 藏海拿着的这把剑是谁的？

example.en: Fans know why Xiao Zhan loves acting so much.
example.zh: 粉丝知道肖战为什么如此热爱表演。

example.en: Shi Ying will protect the empty mulberry forever.
example.zh: 时影将要永远守护空桑。

example.en: Xiao Zhan's will to act well is very strong.
example.zh: 肖战演好角色的意愿十分强烈。

example.en: Xiao Zhan wins the best actor award for his great act.
example.zh: 肖战凭出色表演赢得最佳男演员奖。

example.en: Xiao Zhan looks out of the window at the fans.
example.zh: 肖战看向窗外的粉丝。

example.en: It's windy and Shi Ying's hair flutters in the wind.
example.zh: 起风了，时影的头发在风中飘动。

example.en: Xiao Zhan wears a thick coat in cold winter.
example.zh: 肖战寒冬穿厚外套。

example.en: I wish Xiao Zhan wishe a happy and healthy life.
example.zh: 我希望肖战幸福健康。

example.en: Xiao Zhan's wish is to bring more good works.
example.zh: 肖战的愿望是带来更多好作品。

example.en: Xiao Zhan takes a photo with his fans.
example.zh: 肖战和粉丝合影。

example.en: The woman is a big fan of Xiao Zhan for many years.
example.zh: 这位女士是“上古神虾”了。

example.en: Many women love Xiao Zhan's gentle and sincere style.
example.zh: 很多女性喜欢肖战温柔真诚的风格。

example.en: Xiao Zhan's performance in the play is wonderful.
example.zh: 肖战在话剧中的表演非常精彩。

example.en: Xiao Zhan teaches foreign fans simple Chinese words.
example.zh: 肖战教外国粉丝简单的中文词汇。

example.en: Gu Wei works day and night to save sick people.
example.zh: 顾魏日夜工作救治病人。

example.en: Xiao Zhan's work is loved by people all over the world.
example.zh: 肖战的作品被全世界的人喜爱。

example.en: Sheng Yang thanks the workers for building the stage.
example.zh: 盛阳感谢工人搭建舞台。

example.en: Xiao Zhan's works are known all over the world.
example.zh: 肖战的作品闻名全世界。

example.en: Fans never worry about Xiao Zhan's acting ability.
example.zh: 粉丝从不担心肖战的表演能力。

example.en: Shi Ying's worry is the safety of the empty mulberry.
example.zh: 时影的牵挂是空桑的安危。

example.en: Sheng Yang writes a design plan for his company.
example.zh: 盛阳为公司写设计方案。

example.en: Xiao Zhan never makes a wrong choice in acting.
example.zh: 肖战在表演中从不错选角色。

example.en: Shi Ying practices magic on Jiuyi Mountain for many years.
example.zh: 时影在九嶷山修炼法术多年。

example.en: Xiao Zhan is standing in a field of yellow rapeseed flowers.
example.zh: 肖战站在黄色油菜花田里。

example.en: Shi Ying says yes to teach Zhu Yan simple magic.
example.zh: 时影答应教朱颜简单的法术。

example.en: Gu Wei saved three patients in the hospital yesterday.
example.zh: 顾魏昨天在医院抢救了三位病人。

example.en: Yesterday was a happy day for Xiao Zhan and his fans.
example.zh: 昨天是肖战和粉丝的开心日子。

example.en: You will love Xiao Zhan's new role for sure.
example.zh: 你一定会喜欢肖战的新角色。

example.en: Wei Wuxian is young and lively in his early years.
example.zh: 魏无羡年少时活泼开朗。

example.en: Who is your favourite actor? Xiao Zhan.
example.zh: 谁是你最爱的演员？肖战。

example.en: Xiao Zhan went to the Singapore Zoo.
example.zh: 肖战去了新加坡动物园。
